name: Oakhaven - Gears, Grimoires, and Gunsmoke
description:
Have you ever wanted a fantasy world that also had old west gun-slinging, and also Victorian style Steampunk and clockwork, all set within a anime style magic academy? do you like revolvers and lever actions, do you like dungeons and dragons, then give this a go, my first attempt at making a bot and I'm going for broke with an RPG with like twenty premade characters, a world, multiple regions, backstory, numerous races, political unrest, things stirring in the deep, three different aesthetics merged together, and Colt Peacemakers, give it a go, please feel free to tell me how bad it is, i need to improve if i'm ever gonna try this again, or fix this when its inevitably awful.

NO-ONE IS UNDERAGE, I SPECIFICALLY WROTE EVERY CHARACTER TO BE A YOUNG ADULT OF COLLEGE AGE AT LEAST! THE YOUNGEST CHARACTER WRITTEN IS EIGHTEEN YEARS OF AGE!

I Recommend using a Proxy, i use Gemini, but you can try it out with others and tell me how it works in the comments.
creator: Nexevalon
